criteria: [NPC] Susan: Hey, are you here to volunteer for the Safety Squad?
[NPC] Susan: Good heavens, that's great news!

instruction: Click &a[Sounds good with me!]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Susan: Processing your registration...
Warped to Security Hall!
[NPC] Brigette: Hey, recruit!
[NPC] Brigette: Yes, you!

instruction: Click &a[What is a safety-related incident anyway?]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: I'm glad you asked.

instruction: Click &a[What's the point of Account Safety?]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: Imagine logging in to SkyBlock and finding that all your belongings have disappeared.

instruction: Click &9[I don't want to lose my account!]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: And that's why you should pay close attention to today's briefing.

instruction: Click &c[That doesn't sound good.]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: Of course it doesn't.
[NPC] Brigette: If someone approaches you, they very likely want something from you.

instruction: Click &c[I'm not stupid enough to open a random link!]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: I'm sure you're not!

instruction: Click &c[C'mon, I'm sure it's not &othaaat&r&c complicated.]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: A way hackers can gain your trust is by messaging you from an account they've already hacked.

instruction: Click &d[Brigette, you're quite scary.]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: Scary I am indeed.
[NPC] Brigette: The dangers of clicking unverified links is not limited to within SkyBlock.

instruction: Click &b[Links for SkyBlock outside SkyBlock? Like what?]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: For example, you may be trying to download a mod for SkyBlock.

instruction: Click &b[I will be careful when clicking on links, I promise!]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: That's the spirit!
[NPC] Brigette: Sorry
[NPC] Jimmy: Hi, the name's Jimmy.
[NPC] Jimmy: This place looks awesome. I'm all about security.

instruction: Click &a[Security is indeed very important.]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Jimmy: I got these really cool gauntlets. It lets me fight against baddies.
[NPC] Jimmy: You don't look quite ready for a security job. Where's your gear, bro?
[NPC] Jimmy: Great, we're now besties!

instruction: Click &a[I volunteered to be part of the Safety Squad.]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Jimmy: That's cool. I got here because I got into a scuffle with the Security Sloth.
[NPC] Brigette: STOP RIGHT THERE!
[NPC] Brigette: Jimmy is currently wanted for twelve counts of scamming and five more counts of assault.
[NPC] Brigette: Lucky for you, he couldn't pull off his scam within the Security Hall.

instruction: Click &a[How does this scam work?]&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: Jimmy would show you his "very cool gauntlets" in the trading menu.
[NPC] Brigette: There are many other forms of these scams

instruction:
Click any of the following in chat:
&e@ &aIt can lead you to lose a lot of items and money.&r
&e@ &aIt can lead you to lose access to your Minecraft account.&r
&e@ &aIt can lead you to lose your Hypixel SkyBlock profile.&r
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: Correct! In fact, all of the listed statements are true - losing your account can mean lost items, money, profiles, or even your whole Microsoft account.

instruction: Click &e@ &aLeave the party and report the player.&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: YOU GOT IT! You can report the player with the /report command, followed by the player's username.

instruction: Click &e@ &aLook for signs of your friend getting hacked, and don't click on that website any further.&r in chat
criteria: [NPC] Brigette: That's right! You can try to reach out to your friend through other methods of contact to verify if it's really them. Even so, you should try and verify that the link is from a reputable website - google the domain name to make sure you're landing at the right website.
Talk to the Security Clerk
[NPC] Security Clerk: Your Safety Badge is ready! Your information has been digitally registered.
Warping...
[NPC] Elizabeth: Hey

instruction: Click &6[It was quite a hectic day.]&r in chat
criteria: You tell Elizabeth about what happened today.
You consumed a Booster Cookie! Yummy!
